zh.lifeSummary: 當William L. Hancock於1760年7月18日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特時，他的父親John D. Hancock28歲，母親Elizabeth Maddox28歲。他於1785年10月11日與Sarah Harding在美國維吉尼亞州申南多阿結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1830年住在美國印第安納州弗洛伊德劍橋大學默里 阿爾班尼 堂史普且於1840年住在美國印第安納州弗洛伊德格奧智托 堂史普。他去世於1849年11月在美國肯塔基州韋恩享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William L. Hancock于1760年7月18日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州劍橋大學默里 肯特时，他的父亲John D. Hancock28岁，母亲Elizabeth Maddox28岁。他于1785年10月11日与Sarah Harding在美国弗吉尼亚州申南多阿结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1830年住在美国印第安纳州弗洛伊德劍橋大學默里 阿爾班尼 堂史普且于1840年住在美国印第安纳州弗洛伊德格奧智托 堂史普。他去世于1849年11月在美国肯塔基州韋恩享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hancock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hann + the hypocoristic suffix -cok, which was commonly added to personal names (see Cocke ).
Dutch: from Middle Dutch hanecoc ‘winkle, periwinkle’ (a type of shellfish), probably a metonymic occupational name for someone who gathered and sold shellfish.

History: Thomas Hancock, the uncle of Declaration of Independence signatory John Hancock (1736/7–93), was among the foremost of 18th-century American businessmen. He was a descendant of Nathaniel Hancock, who was known to have been in Cambridge, MA, as early as 1634. Born in Braintree, MA, John Hancock was president of the Second Continental Congress and the first governor of the state of MA.

variants.name: Hancox
meanings: English: variant of Hancock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Handcock
meanings: English: variant of Hancock with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hann
meanings: German and Dutch: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Johann (see John ).

English: from the Middle English personal name Hann, commonly a pet form of Henry (Middle English Hanry). Hann could also be a rhyming pet form of Randolph (Middle English Randal, shortened to Ran or Rand). Han was also a pet form of Joh(a)n in Middle Dutch, and it is possible that this usage was brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no evidence has yet been found that it was similarly used in Middle English. See Henry and Randall , and compare Hankin , Hancock , and Hanks .
English: variant of Ann with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: "Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 15th State
historicEvents.description: On June 1, 1792, Kentucky became the 15th state. It was the first state west of the Appalachian Mountains
Historical Information 1819;  Floyd, Indiana, United States

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.
Historical Information 1833:  Floyd, Indiana, United States

en.lifeSummary: When William L. Hancock was born on 18 July 1760, in New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, John D. Hancock, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Maddox, was 28. He married Sarah Harding on 11 October 1785, in Shenandoah, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 7 daughters. He lived in New Albany Township, Floyd, Indiana, United States in 1830 and Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, United States in 1840. He died in November 1849, in Wayne, Kentucky, United States, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William L. Hancock est né le 18 juillet 1760, à New Kent, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John D. Hancock, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Maddox, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Harding le 11 octobre 1785, à Shenandoah, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 7 filles. Il a vécu à New Albany Township, Floyd, Indiana, États-Unis en 1830 et à Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, États-Unis en 1840. Il est décédé en novembre 1849, à Wayne, Kentucky, États-Unis, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William L. Hancock am 18. Juli 1760 in New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater John D. Hancock 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Maddox 28. Er hat am 11. Oktober 1785 in Shenandoah, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Sarah Harding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1830 hat er in New Albany Township, Floyd, Indiana, Vereinigte Staaten und 1840 in Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb im November 1849 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Wayne, Kentucky, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William L. Hancock è nato il il 18 luglio 1760 nel New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, John D. Hancock, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Maddox, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Harding il 11 ottobre 1785, nel Shenandoah, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a New Albany Township, Floyd, Indiana, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1830 e nel Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1840. Morì nel novembre 1849, nel Wayne, Kentucky, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial Ame: イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ニュー ケント
ja.lifeSummary: William L. Hancockが1760年7月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ニュー ケントで生まれた時，父John D. Hancockは28歳，母Elizabeth Maddoxは28歳であった。1785年10月11日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州シェナンドアでSarah Hardingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1830年にはアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州フロイドニュー アルバニー トウンシュイップに，1840年にはアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州フロイドジョージェトウン トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1849年11月にアメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州ワインで89歳で死去した。

ko.Georgetown, Floyd, Indiana, United State: 미국 인디애나 주 플로이드 조짓운 타운시프 조짓운
ko.Jefferson Co., Kentucky: 미국 캔자스 주 제퍼슨 켄투키 타운시프
ko.St. James Parish, Goochland, Virginia, U: 미국 버지니아 주 구클랜드 스트. 자'스 파리시
ko.Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Uni: 미국 인디애나 주 플로이드 조짓운 타운시프
ko.New Albany Township, Floyd, Indiana, Uni: 미국 인디애나 주 플로이드 뉴 알바니 타운시프
ko.New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial Ame: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 뉴 켄트
ko.lifeSummary: William L. Hancock(이)가 1760년 7월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 뉴 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John D. Hancock(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Maddox(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1785년 10월 11일 미국 버지니아 주 셰난도에서 Sarah Harding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1830년도에 미국 인디애나 주 플로이드 뉴 알바니 타운시프에서, 1840년도에 미국 인디애나 주 플로이드 조짓운 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1849년 11월 미국 켄터키 주 웨이인에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William L. Hancock nasceu em 18 de julho de 1760, em New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, John D. Hancock, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Maddox, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Harding em 11 de outubro de 1785, em Shenandoah, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele viveu em New Albany Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos da América em 1830 e em Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos da América em 1840. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1849, em Wayne, Kentucky, Estados Unidos da América, com 89 anos.

ru.New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial Ame: ню кэнт, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William L. Hancock родился 18 июля 1760 г. в местности ню кэнт, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John D. Hancock было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Maddox, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Harding 11 октября 1785 г. в местности шенандоах, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он жил в местности ню албани тоуншип, флоид, Индиана, Соединенные штаты в 1830 году и в местности джеоргетоун тоуншип, флоид, Индиана, Соединенные штаты в 1840 году. Он умер ноябрь 1849 г. в местности веин, Кентукки, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William L. Hancock nació el 18 de julio de 1760, en New Kent, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, John D. Hancock, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Maddox, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sarah Harding el 11 de octubre de 1785, en Shenandoah, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 7 hijas. Vivió en New Albany Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos en 1830 y en Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos en 1840. Murió en noviembre de 1849, en Wayne, Kentucky, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 89 años.
